languages.text: {n}Себериан поворачивается к вам сразу всем телом под тихое шипение гидравлики. Лязг его имплантов звонким эхом разносится по мостику. Он чуть склоняет голову в приветствии, и шейные аугменты скрежещут под воротом камзола.{/n} "Наследни{mf|к|ца}. Мое поведение после нашего возвращения из ловушки Тразина было неподобающим".

traits.locale_text: {n}Себерин поворачивается к вам сразу всем телом под тихое шипение гидравлики. Лязг его имплантов звонким эхом разносится по мостику. Он чуть склоняет голову в приветствии, и шейные аугменты скрежещут под воротом камзола.{/n} "Наследни{mf|к|ца}. Мое поведение после нашего возвращения из ловушки Тразина было неподобающим".

languages.text: {n}Seberian turns his entire body toward you with a soft hiss of hydraulics. The clanking of his implants echoes sharply across the bridge. He inclines his head slightly in greeting, his neck augmetics grinding beneath the collar of his coat.{/n} "Heir. My conduct after our return from Trazyn's trap was unbecoming."

languages.text: {n}Seberian wendet sich mit einem leisen hydraulischen Zischen zu dir um. Das Klappern seiner Implantate hallt auf der gesamten Brücke wider. Als er grüßend den Kopf neigt, knirschen seine Halsaugmentationen unter dem Kragen seines Mantels.{/n} "{mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Mein Verhalten nach unserer Rückkehr aus Trazyns Falle war ungebührlich."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his entire body toward you with a soft hiss of hydraulics. The clanking of his implants echoes sharply across the bridge. He inclines his head slightly in greeting, his neck augmetics grinding beneath the collar of his coat.{/n} "Heir. My conduct after our return from Trazyn's trap was unbecoming."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian wendet sich mit einem leisen hydraulischen Zischen zu dir um. Das Klappern seiner Implantate hallt auf der gesamten Brücke wider. Als er grüßend den Kopf neigt, knirschen seine Halsaugmentationen unter dem Kragen seines Mantels.{/n} "{mf|Erbe|Erbin}. Mein Verhalten nach unserer Rückkehr aus Trazyns Falle war ungebührlich."

languages.text: {n}Seberian tourne tout son corps vers vous, dans un léger crissement hydraulique. Le cliquetis de ses implants résonne bruyamment sur le pont. Il incline légèrement la tête en guise de salut, faisant grincer l'augmétique de son cou sous le col de sa cape.{/n} « Mon {mf|héritier|héritière}. Je me suis mal comporté depuis que nous nous sommes extirpés du piège de Trazyn. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his entire body toward you with a soft hiss of hydraulics. The clanking of his implants echoes sharply across the bridge. He inclines his head slightly in greeting, his neck augmetics grinding beneath the collar of his coat.{/n} "Heir. My conduct after our return from Trazyn's trap was unbecoming."

Je me suis mal comporté depuis que nous nous sommes extirpés du piège de Trazyn. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian se gira completamente hacia ti con el leve siseo de motores hidráulicos. El clamor de sus implantes retumba por el puente. Inclina la cabeza ligeramente a modo de saludo y oyes el rechinar de los auméticos de su cuello.{/n} «Hereder{mf|o|a}. Mi conducta tras volver de la trampa de Trazyn fue inapropiada».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his entire body toward you with a soft hiss of hydraulics. The clanking of his implants echoes sharply across the bridge. He inclines his head slightly in greeting, his neck augmetics grinding beneath the collar of his coat.{/n} "Heir. My conduct after our return from Trazyn's trap was unbecoming."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian se gira completamente hacia ti con el leve siseo de motores hidráulicos. El clamor de sus implantes retumba por el puente. Inclina la cabeza ligeramente a modo de saludo y oyes el rechinar de los auméticos de su cuello.{/n} «Hereder{mf|o|a}. Mi conducta tras volver de la trampa de Trazyn fue inapropiada».

languages.text: {n}Seberian, yumuşak bir hidrolik tıslamasıyla tüm vücudunu sana çeviriyor. İmplantlarının tıkırtısı köprüde keskin bir şekilde yankılanıyor. Selam vermek için başını hafifçe eğiyor, paltosunun yakasının altındaki boyun ogmetikleri gıcırdıyor.{/n} "Vârisim. Trazyn'in tuzağından döndükten sonraki davranışlarım yakışıksızdı."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his entire body toward you with a soft hiss of hydraulics. The clanking of his implants echoes sharply across the bridge. He inclines his head slightly in greeting, his neck augmetics grinding beneath the collar of his coat.{/n} "Heir. My conduct after our return from Trazyn's trap was unbecoming."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, yumuşak bir hidrolik tıslamasıyla tüm vücudunu sana çeviriyor. İmplantlarının tıkırtısı köprüde keskin bir şekilde yankılanıyor. Selam vermek için başını hafifçe eğiyor, paltosunun yakasının altındaki boyun ogmetikleri gıcırdıyor.{/n} "Vârisim. Trazyn'in tuzağından döndükten sonraki davranışlarım yakışıksızdı."

languages.text: {n}伴着液压系统一道轻柔的嘶声，塞贝里安将整个身子转向你。他植入物的铿锵声在舰桥上显得格外刺耳。他微微颔首致意，颈部的植入物在衣领下发出摩擦声。{/n}“继承人。从特拉金的陷阱归来后，我的举止有失体统。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his entire body toward you with a soft hiss of hydraulics. The clanking of his implants echoes sharply across the bridge. He inclines his head slightly in greeting, his neck augmetics grinding beneath the collar of his coat.{/n} "Heir. My conduct after our return from Trazyn's trap was unbecoming."

traits.locale_text: {n}伴着液压系统一道轻柔的嘶声，塞贝里安将整个身子转向你。他植入物的铿锵声在舰桥上显得格外刺耳。他微微颔首致意，颈部的植入物在衣领下发出摩擦声。{/n}“继承人。从特拉金的陷阱归来后，我的举止有失体统。”

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは、油圧の柔らかな音とともに全身を君の方へ向ける。インプラントの軋む音がブリッジに鋭く響く。彼はコートの襟の下で首のオーグメティックを軋ませながら、軽く頭を下げて挨拶する。{/n}「後継者よ。トラジンの罠から戻って以来の私の振る舞いは、見苦しいものだった。」
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian turns his entire body toward you with a soft hiss of hydraulics. The clanking of his implants echoes sharply across the bridge. He inclines his head slightly in greeting, his neck augmetics grinding beneath the collar of his coat.{/n} "Heir. My conduct after our return from Trazyn's trap was unbecoming."

traits.locale_text: {n}セベリアンは、油圧の柔らかな音とともに全身を君の方へ向ける。インプラントの軋む音がブリッジに鋭く響く。彼はコートの襟の下で首のオーグメティックを軋ませながら、軽く頭を下げて挨拶する。{/n}「後継者よ。トラジンの罠から戻って以来の私の振る舞いは、見苦しいものだった。」
